name: mindframe
description: Customer-installable bundle for shipping AI-agent infrastructure. Composes agent-spawning, session-mesh, knowledge-base, event-routing, status-dashboard, and browser-automation into one onboardable product. First wedge: AI Sentry triage.

anthropic_api_key.description: Anthropic API key used by spawned agents in this deployment. Bring your own from your Team or Enterprise org. Stored in the system keychain.

customer_name.description: Short identifier for this deployment (e.g. 'acme'). Used in vault paths, daemon names, and routing recipes so multiple deployments on one machine don't collide.

vault_path.description: Where the customer-domain knowledge base lives. Mindframe scaffolds the v2 schema (Services, Repositories, Decisions, Incidents, Runbooks) into this directory. Defaults to ~/.mindframe/<customer_name>/vault.
